const STYLES = `
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');

  :root {

  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--amber); border-radius:10px; }

  @keyframes fadeLeft  { from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(50px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} }

  @keyframes petFloat  { 0%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-55%)} 50%{transform:translate(-50%,-60%)} }
  @keyframes floatPill { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)} }
  @keyframes blink     { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.2} }
  @keyframes shimmer   { 0%{background-position:-200% center} 100%{background-position:200% center} }
  @keyframes scaleIn   { from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.93)} to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)} }
  @keyframes slideInL  { from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-30px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} }
  @keyframes ripple    { to{transform:scale(4);opacity:0} }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  .ph-about-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:80px; align-items:center; }
  .ph-about-img-main { width:100%;height:500px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#261000,#4a2000); border-radius:36px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:11rem; position:relative; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:32px 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); }
  .ph-about-img-main img { width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;border-radius:36px; }
  .ph-about-badge { position:absolute; bottom:-20px; right:-20px; background:var(--amber); color:white; border-radius:22px; padding:22px; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 14px 44px rgba(200,134,26,0.4); }
  .ph-about-yrs { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:2.8rem; font-weight:900; line-height:1; }
  .ph-about-yrs-lbl { font-size:0.75rem; opacity:0.85; margin-top:2px; }
  .ph-about-text { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.9; margin-bottom:32px; }
  .ph-about-pts { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; margin-bottom:36px; }
  .ph-about-pt { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; }
  .ph-chk { width:26px;height:26px; flex-shrink:0; background:var(--amber-xs); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--amber); }
  .ph-pt-txt { font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--text); line-height:1.65; }

  /* ── GALLERY ── */
  .ph-gallery-bg { background:var(--surface); padding:100px 0; }
  .ph-gallery-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); grid-template-rows:200px 200px; gap:14px; margin-top:52px; }
  .ph-gal-item { border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; cursor:pointer; position:relative; }
  .ph-gal-item img { width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform 0.5s ease; }
  .ph-gal-item:hover img { transform:scale(1.08); }
  .ph-gal-item:hover::after { opacity:1; }
  .ph-gal-item::after { content:'View'; position:absolute;inset:0; background:rgba(200,134,26,0.8); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:700; color:white; letter-spacing:0.1em; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
  .ph-gal-item:nth-child(1),.ph-gal-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column:span 2; }

  /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
  .ph-testi-bg { background:var(--card); padding:100px 0; }
  .ph-testi-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; }
  .ph-testi-card { background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:32px; transition:all 0.3s; }
  .ph-testi-card:hover { border-color:rgba(200,134,26,0.35); transform:translateY(-4px); }
  .ph-testi-stars { font-size:1rem; margin-bottom:14px; letter-spacing:2px; }
  .ph-testi-text { font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.85; margin-bottom:22px; font-style:italic; }
  .ph-testi-author { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; }
  .ph-testi-avatar { width:46px;height:46px; border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--amber),#8b3a00); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:700; color:white; font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; }
  .ph-testi-name { font-weight:600; color:var(--text); font-size:0.9rem; }
  .ph-testi-city { font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--muted); }

  /* ── CTA ── */
  .ph-cta-bg { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8b5000 0%,#c8861a 50%,#8b5000 100%); background-size:200% auto; animation:shimmer 4s linear infinite; padding:100px 60px; text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .ph-cta-bg::before { content:'🐾'; position:absolute; font-size:22rem; opacity:0.06; top:-50px;right:-50px; line-height:1; pointer-events:none; }
  .ph-cta-title { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:clamp(2.5rem,4vw,3.8rem); font-weight:900; color:white; margin-bottom:18px; position:relative; }
  .ph-cta-sub   { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-size:1.05rem; max-width:520px; margin:0 auto 40px; line-height:1.75; }
  .ph-cta-btns  { display:flex; gap:16px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .ph-contact-bg { background:var(--bg); padding:100px 0; }
  .ph-contact-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1.2fr; gap:80px; align-items:start; }
  .ph-ci-item { display:flex; gap:18px; margin-bottom:30px; }
  .ph-ci-icon { width:50px;height:50px; flex-shrink:0; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--amber),#8b5000); border-radius:15px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.3rem; box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(200,134,26,0.3); }
  .ph-ci-title { font-weight:600; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:4px; font-size:0.9rem; }
  .ph-ci-text  { font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.65; white-space:pre-line; }
  .ph-form-box { background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:32px; padding:48px; }
  .ph-form-title { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.7rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .ph-form-sub  { color:var(--muted); font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:30px; }
  .ph-input { width:100%; padding:14px 20px; border:1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius:14px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.92rem; color:var(--text); background:var(--card); margin-bottom:14px; transition:border-color 0.2s; outline:none; }
  .ph-input:focus { border-color:var(--amber); }
  .ph-input::placeholder { color:var(--dim); }
  .ph-textarea { height:110px; resize:vertical; }
  .ph-submit { width:100%; padding:16px; background:var(--amber); color:white; border:none; border-radius:14px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.3s; margin-top:6px; }
  .ph-submit:hover { background:#a86e10; transform:translateY(-2px); }
  .ph-submit:disabled { opacity:0.6; cursor:not-allowed; }
  .ph-success { background:rgba(16,185,129,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3); color:#34d399; border-radius:12px; padding:12px 18px; font-size:0.85rem; margin-bottom:14px; display:flex; gap:8px; }

  /* ── HOME SERVICES ── */
  .ph-home-svc-bg { background:var(--surface); padding:100px 0; }
  .ph-home-svc-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; }

  /* ── TOAST ── */
  .ph-toast {
    position:fixed; bottom:28px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    padding:13px 28px; border-radius:50px; z-index:9999;
    font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:600; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
    box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease both;
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media(max-width:1100px) {
    .ph-hero-content { grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:110px 36px 60px; }
    .ph-main-card { display:none; }
    .ph-pets-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .ph-prod-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .ph-svc-grid, .ph-home-svc-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .ph-testi-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .ph-about-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .ph-contact-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .ph-gallery-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); grid-template-rows:auto; }
    .ph-gal-item { grid-column:span 1 !important; height:180px; }
  }
  @media(max-width:680px) {
    .ph-wrap { padding:0 20px; }
    .ph-prodnav-inner, .ph-sub-tabs-inner { padding:0 20px; }
    .ph-trust { gap:20px; padding:24px 20px; }
    .ph-pets-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .ph-prod-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .ph-svc-grid, .ph-home-svc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .ph-hero-stats { gap:24px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
    .ph-gallery-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
  }
`;

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MAIN COMPONENT
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function Home() {
  /* ── state ── */
  const [uname,      setusername] = useState("");
  const [email,      setemail]    = useState("");
  const [message,    setmessage]  = useState("");
  const [mobile,     setmobile]   = useState("");
  const [products,   setProducts] = useState([]);
  const [sending,    setSending]  = useState(false);
  const [sent,       setSent]     = useState(false);
  const [toast,      setToast]    = useState(null);
  const [prodPage,   setProdPage] = useState("dogs"); // "dogs"|"cats"|"birds"|"fish"
  const [prodSubTab, setProdSubTab]= useState("breeds");// "breeds"|"food"|"pharma"|"wash"|"toys"|"tools"
  const [svcPage,    setSvcPage]  = useState("dogs");  // service sub-page
  const [wishlist,   setWishlist] = useState({});
  const [cartAdded,  setCartAdded]= useState({});
  const [prodCartAdded,setProdCartAdded] = useState({});
  const [showAllPets,setShowAllPets]     = useState(false);
  const heroRef  = useRef(null);
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const SUB_TABS = [
    { key:"breeds", label:"🐾 Breeds" },
    { key:"food",   label:"🍖 Food" },
    { key:"pharma", label:"💊 Pharmacy" },
    { key:"wash",   label:"🛁 Grooming" },
    { key:"toys",   label:"🧸 Toys" },
    { key:"tools",  label:"🔧 Tools" },
  ];
  const PROD_TAB_MAP = { food:0, pharma:1, wash:2, toys:3, tools:4 };

  /* ── fetch products ── */
  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(`${API}/show.php`)
      .then(res => setProducts(res.data || []))
      .catch(() => setProducts([]));
  }, []);

  /* ── reveal on scroll ── */
  useEffect(() => {
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver(
      entries => entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add("visible"); obs.unobserve(e.target); }
      }),
      { threshold: 0.1 }
    );
    document.querySelectorAll(".reveal").forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
    return () => obs.disconnect();
  }, [products, prodPage, prodSubTab, svcPage]);

  /* ── parallax ── */
  useEffect(() => {
    const h = () => {
      if (heroRef.current)
        heroRef.current.style.setProperty("--scroll", `${window.scrollY * 0.35}px`);
    };
    window.addEventListener("scroll", h);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", h);
  }, []);

  /* ── helpers ── */
  const showToast = (msg, type = "success") => {
    setToast({ msg, type });
    setTimeout(() => setToast(null), 3000);
  };

  const handleAddToCart = (pid) => {
    const uid = localStorage.getItem("uid") || 1;
    axios.get(`${API}/insert.php?pid=${pid}&uid=${uid}`)
      .then(() => showToast("Added to cart! 🛒"))
      .catch(() => showToast("Please login first 🔐", "error"));
  };

  const toggleWish = (key) => setWishlist(w => ({ ...w, [key]: !w[key] }));

  const addPetCart = (key) => {
    setCartAdded(c => ({ ...c, [key]: true }));
    setTimeout(() => setCartAdded(c => ({ ...c, [key]: false })), 1600);
  };

  const addProdCart = (key) => {
    setProdCartAdded(c => ({ ...c, [key]: true }));
    setTimeout(() => setProdCartAdded(c => ({ ...c, [key]: false })), 1500);
  };

  /* ── contact ── */
  function handleForm(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    setSending(true);
    const data = { name: uname, email, mobile, message };
    axios({
      method: "post", url: `${API}/contact.php`, data,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" },
    }).then(() => {
      setSending(false); setSent(true);
      setTimeout(() => setSent(false), 4000);
      navigate(0);
    }).catch(() => setSending(false));
  }

  /* ── current pet category ── */
  const CAT   = PET_DATA[prodPage];
  const SVCAT = PET_DATA[svcPage];
  const displayPets = showAllPets ? CAT.pets : CAT.pets.slice(0, 4);

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     RENDER
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  return (
    <>
      <style>{STYLES}</style>

      {/* TOAST */}
      {toast && (
        <div className="ph-toast" style={{
          background: toast.type === "success" ? "#261000" : "#5a1000",
          color: toast.type === "success" ? "#e8a840" : "#ff7a7a",
          border: `1px solid ${toast.type === "success" ? "rgba(200,134,26,0.4)" : "rgba(255,100,100,0.3)"}`,
        }}>
          {toast.msg}
        </div>
      )}

      <Nav />

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          HERO
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <section className="ph-hero" ref={heroRef}>
        <div className="ph-hero-bg" />
        <div className="ph-orb ph-orb-1" />
        <div className="ph-orb ph-orb-2" />
        <div className="ph-orb ph-orb-3" />

        <div className="ph-hero-content">
          <div>
            <div className="ph-hero-badge"><span className="ph-dot" />India's #1 Premium Pet Store</div>
            <h1 className="ph-hero-title">
              Find Your<br /><em>Perfect</em><br />Companion
            </h1>
            <p className="ph-hero-sub">
              Handpicked, purebred dogs & pets — each one health-certified,
              vaccinated, and ready to fill your home with joy.
              Trusted by 2,000+ families across India.
            </p>
            <div className="ph-hero-btns">
              <button className="ph-btn ph-btn-amber"
                onClick={() => document.getElementById("products-section")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:"smooth" })}>
                Shop Pets 🐾
              </button>
              <button className="ph-btn ph-btn-ghost"
                onClick={() => document.getElementById("contact-section")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:"smooth" })}>
                Contact Us
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="ph-hero-stats">
              {[["50+","Breeds"],["2K+","Happy Families"],["100%","Health Certified"],["5★","Avg Rating"]].map(([n,l]) => (
                <div key={l}><div className="ph-stat-num">{n}</div><div className="ph-stat-lbl">{l}</div></div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="ph-hero-visual">
            <div className="ph-main-card">
              <div className="ph-main-pet">🐕</div>
              <div className="ph-card-info">
                <span className="ph-card-badge-tag">⭐ Featured</span>
                <div className="ph-card-pname">Golden Retriever</div>
                <div className="ph-card-pprice">Starting ₹25,000</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="ph-float-pill">
              <div className="ph-pill-icon">🏠</div>
              <div className="ph-pill-text">Happy Homes</div>
              <div className="ph-pill-val">2,400+</div>
            </div>
            <div className="ph-float-pill">
              <div className="ph-pill-icon">💉</div>
              <div className="ph-pill-text">Vaccinated</div>
              <div className="ph-pill-val">100%</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          TRUST BAR
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div className="ph-trust">
        {[
          { icon:"🏥", title:"Vet Certified",       sub:"All pets health-checked before delivery" },
          { icon:"🚚", title:"Pan-India Delivery",  sub:"Safe transport with live tracking" },
          { icon:"📜", title:"KCI Registered",      sub:"Official pedigree certificates provided" },
          { icon:"💬", title:"Lifetime Support",    sub:"Expert guidance for your pet's life" },
        ].map(t => (
          <div className="ph-trust-item" key={t.title}>
            <div className="ph-trust-icon">{t.icon}</div>
            <div><div className="ph-trust-title">{t.title}</div><div className="ph-trust-sub">{t.sub}</div></div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          PRODUCTS SECTION (with sub-pages)
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div id="products-section">
        {/* Top nav: Dogs / Cats / Birds / Fish */}
        <div className="ph-prodnav">
          <div className="ph-prodnav-inner">
            {Object.entries(PET_DATA).map(([key, d]) => (
              <button key={key}
                className={`ph-prodnav-tab${prodPage === key ? " active" : ""}`}
                onClick={() => { setProdPage(key); setProdSubTab("breeds"); setShowAllPets(false); }}>
                {d.emoji} {d.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Pet Hero Banner */}
        <div className="ph-pet-hero">
          <img className="ph-pet-hero-img" src={CAT.hero} alt={CAT.label} />
          <div className="ph-pet-hero-overlay" />
          <div className="ph-pet-hero-text">
            <div className="ph-wrap" style={{width:"100%"}}>
              <div style={{animation:"slideInL 0.5s ease both"}}>
                <div className="ph-pet-hero-emoji">{CAT.emoji}</div>
                <div className="ph-pet-hero-title">{CAT.label}</div>
                <div className="ph-pet-hero-sub">{CAT.tagline} — {CAT.pets.length} breeds available</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Sub Tabs: Breeds | Food | Pharmacy | Grooming | Toys | Tools */}
        <div className="ph-sub-tabs">
          <div className="ph-sub-tabs-inner">
            {SUB_TABS.map(t => (
              <button key={t.key}
                className={`ph-sub-tab${prodSubTab === t.key ? " active" : ""}`}
                onClick={() => setProdSubTab(t.key)}>
                {t.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* ─── BREEDS TAB ─── */}
        {prodSubTab === "breeds" && (
          <div style={{background:"var(--bg)",padding:"60px 0"}}>
            <div className="ph-wrap">
              <div className="ph-section-hd">
                <div>
                  <div className="ph-label">Pure Breeds</div>
                  <h2 className="ph-h2">Find Your Dream {CAT.label.slice(0,-1) || CAT.label}</h2>
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:"0.85rem",color:"var(--muted)"}}>{CAT.pets.length} breeds available</span>
              </div>

              <div className="ph-pets-grid">
                {displayPets.map((pet, i) => {
                  const key = `${prodPage}-${i}`;
                  return (
                    <div className="ph-pet-card reveal" key={key}>
                      <div className="ph-pet-img-wrap">
                        <img src={pet.img} alt={pet.name} />
                        {pet.badge && (
                          <span className="ph-badge" style={{
                            background: BADGE_CFG[pet.badge]?.bg,
                            color: BADGE_CFG[pet.badge]?.text,
                          }}>{pet.badge}</span>
                        )}
                        <button className="ph-wish" onClick={() => toggleWish(key)}>
                          {wishlist[key] ? "❤️" : "🤍"}
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      <div className="ph-pet-body">
                        <div className="ph-pet-breed">Pure Breed · {CAT.label.replace(/s$/,"")}</div>
                        <div className="ph-pet-name">{pet.name}</div>
                        <div className="ph-pet-desc">{pet.desc}</div>
                        <div className="ph-pet-tags">
                          {["💉 Vaccinated","📜 KCI Certified","🏠 Rehomeable"].map(t => (
                            <span className="ph-pet-tag" key={t}>{t}</span>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                        <div className="ph-pet-foot">
                          <div className="ph-price">{pet.price}<small> onwards</small></div>
                          <button className={`ph-add-btn${cartAdded[key] ? " done" : ""}`}
                            onClick={() => addPetCart(key)}>
                            {cartAdded[key] ? "✓" : "🛒"}
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              {!showAllPets && CAT.pets.length > 4 && (
                <div className="ph-view-more-row">
                  <button className="ph-btn ph-btn-amber" onClick={() => setShowAllPets(true)}>
                    View All {CAT.label} ({CAT.pets.length - 4} more) →
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ─── PRODUCT TABS (Food / Pharma / Wash / Toys / Tools) ─── */}
        {prodSubTab !== "breeds" && (
          <div style={{background:"var(--bg)",padding:"60px 0"}}>
            <div className="ph-wrap">
              {(() => {
                const tabIdx = PROD_TAB_MAP[prodSubTab];
                const sec    = CAT.products[tabIdx];
                if (!sec) return null;
                return (
                  <>
                    <div className="ph-section-hd">
                      <div>
                        <div className="ph-label">{CAT.emoji} {CAT.label} Products</div>
                        <h2 className="ph-h2">{sec.sec}</h2>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="ph-prod-grid">
                      {sec.items.map((item, ii) => {
                        const pk = `${prodPage}-${prodSubTab}-${ii}`;
                        return (
                          <div className="ph-prod-card reveal" key={pk}>
                            <div className="ph-prod-img">
                              <img src={item.img} alt={item.name} />
                            </div>
                            <div className="ph-prod-body">
                              <div className="ph-prod-name">{item.name}</div>
                              <div className="ph-prod-foot">
                                <div className="ph-prod-price">{item.price}</div>
                                <button className={`ph-prod-add${prodCartAdded[pk] ? " done" : ""}`}
                                  onClick={() => addProdCart(pk)}>
                                  {prodCartAdded[pk] ? "✓ Added" : "+ Add"}
                                </button>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>

                    {/* Show other sections below too */}
                    {CAT.products.map((s, si) => {
                      if (si === tabIdx) return null;
                      return (
                        <div className="ph-prod-section" key={si} style={{marginTop:56}}>
                          <div className="ph-prod-sec-hd">
                            <div className="ph-prod-sec-title">{s.sec}</div>
                            <span style={{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:"var(--muted)"}}>
                              {s.items.length} products
                            </span>
                          </div>
                          <div className="ph-prod-grid">
                            {s.items.map((item, ii) => {
                              const pk2 = `${prodPage}-s${si}-${ii}`;
                              return (
                                <div className="ph-prod-card reveal" key={pk2}>
                                  <div className="ph-prod-img">
                                    <img src={item.img} alt={item.name} />
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="ph-prod-body">
                                    <div className="ph-prod-name">{item.name}</div>
                                    <div className="ph-prod-foot">
                                      <div className="ph-prod-price">{item.price}</div>
                                      <button className={`ph-prod-add${prodCartAdded[pk2] ? " done" : ""}`}
                                        onClick={() => addProdCart(pk2)}>
                                        {prodCartAdded[pk2] ? "✓ Added" : "+ Add"}
                                      </button>
                                    </div>
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              );
                            })}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </>
                );
              })()}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          DB PRODUCTS (from show.php)
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      {products.length > 0 && (
        <div style={{background:"var(--surface)",padding:"80px 0",borderTop:"1px solid var(--border)"}}>
          <div className="ph-wrap">
            <div className="ph-section-hd">
              <div>
                <div className="ph-label">From Our Store</div>
                <h2 className="ph-h2">Top Picks This Month</h2>
              </div>
              <NavLink to="product" style={{color:"var(--amber)",fontSize:"0.9rem",fontWeight:600,textDecoration:"none"}}>
                View All →
              </NavLink>
            </div>
            <div className="ph-pets-grid">
              {products.slice(0,4).map((p, i) => (
                <div className="ph-pet-card reveal" key={p.id}>
                  <div className="ph-pet-img-wrap" style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,#261000,#4a2000)`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:"5rem"}}>
                    {["🐕","🐈","🦜","🐠"][i % 4]}
                  </div>
                  <div className="ph-pet-body">
                    <div className="ph-pet-breed">Pure Breed · Pet</div>
                    <div className="ph-pet-name">{p.pname}</div>
                    <div className="ph-pet-tags">
                      <span className="ph-pet-tag">💉 Vaccinated</span>
                      <span className="ph-pet-tag">📜 KCI Certified</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="ph-pet-foot">
                      <div className="ph-price">₹{parseInt(p.price).toLocaleString("en-IN")}<small> onwards</small></div>
                      <button className="ph-add-btn" onClick={() => handleAddToCart(p.id)}>🛒</button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          SERVICES SECTION (with pet sub-pages)
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div id="services-section" style={{background:"var(--bg)"}}>
        <div style={{background:"var(--surface)",borderBottom:"1px solid var(--border)",borderTop:"1px solid var(--border)"}}>
          <div style={{maxWidth:1340,margin:"0 auto",padding:"0 60px",display:"flex",gap:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
            {/* Home Services tab */}
            <button
              className={`ph-prodnav-tab${svcPage === "home" ? " active" : ""}`}
              onClick={() => setSvcPage("home")}>
              🏥 All Services
            </button>
            {Object.entries(PET_DATA).map(([key, d]) => (
              <button key={key}
                className={`ph-prodnav-tab${svcPage === key ? " active" : ""}`}
                onClick={() => setSvcPage(key)}>
                {d.emoji} {d.label} Care
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="ph-wrap" style={{paddingTop:80,paddingBottom:80}}>
          {svcPage === "home" ? (
            <>
              <div className="ph-section-hd">
                <div>
                  <div className="ph-label">What We Offer</div>
                  <h2 className="ph-h2">Our Services</h2>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="ph-home-svc-grid">
                {HOME_SERVICES.map((s, i) => (
                  <div className="ph-svc-card reveal" key={i}>
                    <div className="ph-svc-icon">{s.icon}</div>
                    <div className="ph-svc-title">{s.title}</div>
                    <p className="ph-svc-desc">{s.text}</p>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </>
          ) : (
            <>
              <div className="ph-section-hd">
                <div>
                  <div className="ph-label">{SVCAT.emoji} {SVCAT.label} Specialist Services</div>
                  <h2 className="ph-h2">{SVCAT.label} Care Services</h2>
                </div>
                <p style={{color:"var(--muted)",fontSize:"0.9rem",maxWidth:420,lineHeight:1.7,margin:0}}>
                  Expert services tailored specifically for your {SVCAT.label.toLowerCase()}'s health, happiness and well-being.
                </p>
              </div>

              {/* Hero image for this pet's service page */}
              <div style={{borderRadius:28,overflow:"hidden",height:280,marginBottom:48,position:"relative"}} className="reveal">
                <img src={SVCAT.hero} alt={SVCAT.label}
                  style={{width:"100%",height:"100%",objectFit:"cover",display:"block",filter:"brightness(0.4)"}} />
                <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:"4rem"}}>{SVCAT.emoji}</span>
                  <h3 style={{fontFamily:"Playfair Display,serif",fontSize:"2rem",color:"white",fontWeight:700}}>
                    {SVCAT.label} Care Centre
                  </h3>
                  <p style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)",fontSize:"0.95rem"}}>{SVCAT.tagline}</p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="ph-svc-grid">
                {SVCAT.services.map((s, i) => (
                  <div className="ph-svc-card reveal" key={i}>
                    <div className="ph-svc-icon">{s.icon}</div>
                    <div className="ph-svc-title">{s.title}</div>
                    <p className="ph-svc-desc">{s.desc}</p>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          ABOUT
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div style={{background:"var(--surface)",padding:"100px 0",borderTop:"1px solid var(--border)"}}>
        <div className="ph-wrap">
          <div className="ph-about-grid">
            <div className="reveal" style={{position:"relative"}}>
              <div className="ph-about-img-main">
                <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587300003388-59208cc962cb?w=700&q=85" alt="about" />
              </div>
              <div className="ph-about-badge">
                <div className="ph-about-yrs">5+</div>
                <div className="ph-about-yrs-lbl">Years of Trust</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="reveal">
              <div className="ph-label">Our Story</div>
              <h2 style={{fontFamily:"Playfair Display,serif",fontSize:"clamp(2rem,3vw,2.8rem)",fontWeight:700,color:"var(--text)",marginBottom:24,lineHeight:1.2}}>
                More Than a Pet Shop —<br/>A Family for Your Family
              </h2>
              <p className="ph-about-text">
                Petology started with one simple belief: every pet deserves a loving home,
                and every family deserves a healthy, happy companion. We work directly with
                responsible breeders across India to bring you certified, well-cared-for pets —
                never from puppy mills.
              </p>
              <div className="ph-about-pts">
                {[
                  "All pets are vet-examined and vaccinated before going home",
                  "KCI/CFAB pedigree registration for all purebred animals",
                  "Pan-India safe delivery with temperature-controlled transport",
                  "Post-purchase support — we're with you for your pet's whole life",
                ].map((pt, i) => (
                  <div className="ph-about-pt" key={i}>
                    <div className="ph-chk">✓</div>
                    <div className="ph-pt-txt">{pt}</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              <button className="ph-btn ph-btn-amber"
                onClick={() => document.getElementById("products-section")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:"smooth" })}>
                Meet Our Pets 🐕
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          GALLERY
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div className="ph-gallery-bg" id="gallery-section">
        <div className="ph-wrap">
          <div className="ph-label" style={{color:"var(--amber)"}}>Our Gallery</div>
          <h2 className="ph-h2">Happy Pets, Happy Homes</h2>
          <div className="ph-gallery-grid reveal">
            {[
              "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587300003388-59208cc962cb?w=600&q=80",
              "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574158622682-e40e69881006?w=600&q=80",
              "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1552728089-57bdde30beb3?w=600&q=80",
              "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535591273668-578e31182c4f?w=600&q=80",
              "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1633722715463-d30f4f325e24?w=600&q=80",
            ].map((src, i) => (
              <div className="ph-gal-item" key={i}>
                <img src={src} alt={`gallery-${i}`} />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          TESTIMONIALS
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div className="ph-testi-bg">
        <div className="ph-wrap">
          <div className="ph-section-hd">
            <div>
              <div className="ph-label">Happy Customers</div>
              <h2 className="ph-h2">What Families Say</h2>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="ph-testi-grid">
            {[
              { name:"Priya Sharma",  city:"Mumbai",    init:"P",
                text:"We got our Golden Retriever from Petology last year — the entire process was seamless. The pup arrived healthy, vaccinated, and full of energy. The team even followed up a week later!" },
              { name:"Rahul Mehta",   city:"Ahmedabad", init:"R",
                text:"Best pet store experience by far. The staff guided us through choosing the right breed for our apartment. Our Shih Tzu is an absolute delight — perfectly adapted to our home." },
              { name:"Anjali Patel",  city:"Surat",     init:"A",
                text:"The grooming service is exceptional. My Persian cat gets treated like royalty every visit. The vets here are genuinely knowledgeable — you can feel they love animals." },
            ].map((t, i) => (
              <div className="ph-testi-card reveal" key={i}>
                <div className="ph-testi-stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
                <p className="ph-testi-text">"{t.text}"</p>
                <div className="ph-testi-author">
                  <div className="ph-testi-avatar">{t.init}</div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="ph-testi-name">{t.name}</div>
                    <div className="ph-testi-city">{t.city}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          CTA
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div className="ph-cta-bg">
        <h2 className="ph-cta-title">Ready to Find Your Furry Friend?</h2>
        <p className="ph-cta-sub">
          Join 2,000+ Indian families who found their perfect companion through Petology.
          Create a free account and start browsing today.
        </p>
        <div className="ph-cta-btns">
          <button className="ph-btn ph-btn-white"
            onClick={() => document.getElementById("products-section")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:"smooth" })}>
            Browse Pets 🐾
          </button>
          <button className="ph-btn ph-btn-outline-white"
            onClick={() => document.getElementById("contact-section")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:"smooth" })}>
            Talk to Us
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
          CONTACT
      ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
      <div className="ph-contact-bg" id="contact-section">
        <div className="ph-wrap">
          <div className="ph-contact-grid">
            <div className="reveal">
              <div className="ph-label">Get in Touch</div>
              <h2 style={{fontFamily:"Playfair Display,serif",fontSize:"clamp(2rem,3vw,2.6rem)",fontWeight:700,color:"var(--text)",marginBottom:40,lineHeight:1.2}}>
                We'd Love to Hear From You
              </h2>
              {[
                { icon:"📍", title:"Visit Us",  text:"Shop No. 12, Pet Paradise Complex\nRing Road, Surat, Gujarat — 395007" },
                { icon:"📞", title:"Call Us",   text:"+91 98765 43210\nMon–Sat, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM" },
                { icon:"✉️", title:"Email Us",  text:"hello@petology.in\nReply within 24 hours" },
              ].map((c, i) => (
                <div className="ph-ci-item" key={i}>
                  <div className="ph-ci-icon">{c.icon}</div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="ph-ci-title">{c.title}</div>
                    <div className="ph-ci-text">{c.text}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            <div className="ph-form-box reveal">
              <div className="ph-form-title">Send a Message</div>
              <p className="ph-form-sub">We'll get back to you within 24 hours.</p>
              {sent && <div className="ph-success">✅ Thank you! We'll contact you soon.</div>}
              <form onSubmit={handleForm}>
                <input className="ph-input" type="text"  placeholder="Your Name *"        onChange={e=>setusername(e.target.value)} required />
                <input className="ph-input" type="tel"   placeholder="Phone Number *"     onChange={e=>setmobile(e.target.value)}   required />
                <input className="ph-input" type="email" placeholder="Email Address *"    onChange={e=>setemail(e.target.value)}    required />
                <textarea className="ph-input ph-textarea" placeholder="Your Message..." onChange={e=>setmessage(e.target.value)} />
                <button className="ph-submit" type="submit" disabled={sending}>
                  {sending ? "Sending..." : "Send Message →"}
                </button>
              </form>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

export default Home;
